brand.name: DEIS (Deaf Education Intelligence System)
brand.archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) modified for Warm Inclusivity

rules.card_title: text-lg font-medium text-zinc-100 flex items-center gap-2
rules.stats: font-mono text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-light tracking-tighter text-white

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8) to reduce cognitive load. The 'Control Room' grid for dashboards.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strictly left-aligned text within cards for readability. Optical alignment for icons.

glass_panel.usage: Sticky headers, AI Tutor floating panel

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF7A59] text-white hover:bg-[#F97316] font-medium rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-all active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 font-medium rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 font-medium rounded-xl px-4 py-2

badges.risk_high: bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border border-red-500/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.risk_low: bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

shadcn_overrides.card: Remove default shadow, use E1 dashboard_card styles
shadcn_overrides.tabs: Pill-shaped list (bg-white/5 p-1 rounded-xl), triggers with rounded-lg text-zinc-400 data-[state=active]:bg-[#12121A] data-[state=active]:text-white
shadcn_overrides.input: bg-[#0E0E14] border-white/10 focus-visible:ring-[#FF7A59] text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 rounded-xl h-12

accessibility_and_visuals.visual_first: CRITICAL: Every text label must have a corresponding Lucide icon (e.g., 'Weak Topics' + AlertTriangle). Deaf students benefit from strong visual anchors.
accessibility_and_visuals.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and cards MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-student-btn').
accessibility_and_visuals.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA guidelines against #12121A. Never use pure gray, always tint with zinc (blue-ish).
accessibility_and_visuals.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Animations should be fluid but quick (duration 200-300ms) to avoid feeling sluggish.

role_switcher_landing.layout: Split screen or centered bento grid
role_switcher_landing.background: Use global_gradient_bg covered by a very subtle noise texture.
role_switcher_landing.cards: Two massive cards (Student vs Teacher) with hover scaling.

student_dashboard.hero_card: Col-span-full md:col-span-8. Contains greeting, overall score, and progress timeline.
student_dashboard.weak_topics: Col-span-full md:col-span-4. High tension, high contrast warning colors.
student_dashboard.ai_recommendations: List view with thumbnail placeholders for 'Visual Content'.

teacher_dashboard.kpi_row: 4 summary cards (Class Avg, At Risk, Topics Covered, Engagement).
teacher_dashboard.heatmap: Col-span-2 or 3. Use Recharts for difficulty heatmap.
teacher_dashboard.risk_alerts: Col-span-1. Vertical feed of students needing immediate attention.

hero_background.description: 3D abstract composition of floating glowing frosted glass shapes. Use for landing page hero or authentication screen.

global_gradient_bg.description: Abstract soft gradient. Use as a fixed background for the app with 20-30% opacity to break the pure black void.

ai_tutor_avatar.description: Minimalist 3D AI core icon. Use in the AI Chat/Tutor panel as the bot's avatar.

instructions_to_main_agent: FILES FORMAT: Create ONLY `.js` or `.jsx` files. DO NOT output `.tsx` or `.ts` files as the environment uses JavaScript.
COMPONENT STRUCTURE: Use purely HTML/Tailwind for structural bento-grid layouts. Use customized Shadcn for interactive components (Cards, Tabs, Tables).
DARK MODE ONLY: Hardcode dark mode classes or force `dark` on the HTML tag. The user explicitly requested a dark theme.
DATA ATTRIBUTES: Every single clickable element, form input, and significant data display card must have a `data-testid` attribute. E.g. <button data-testid='submit-quiz-btn'>
NO PLACEHOLDERS: Use the image URLs provided in `media_and_assets`. Do not use dummyimage.com or via.placeholder.com.
VISUAL ACCESSIBILITY: Because DEIS is for Deaf/Hard-of-Hearing students, text should be supported by icons (`lucide-react`). Use high-contrast text and clear layout hierarchies.
CHARTS: Use Recharts with the specific color palette provided in `colors.charts`.
FONTS: Import and use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text via Google Fonts. Do NOT use Inter or Roboto.
